query: SELECT sa.role, tm.name, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) as cnt FROM surveys s INNER JOIN survey_assignments sa ON sa.surveyId = s.id LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON tm.id = sa.userId WHERE s.status IN ('follow_up','quoted','negotiating') GROUP BY sa.role, tm.name ORDER BY sa.role, cnt DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AnaPRc1Kpw1Jvjc.659756d42373 --database 6acGApiU8Bjnxuzxb5vkwU --execute SELECT sa.role, tm.name, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) as cnt FROM surveys s INNER JOIN survey_assignments sa ON sa.surveyId = s.id LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON tm.id = sa.userId WHERE s.status IN ('follow_up','quoted','negotiating') GROUP BY sa.role, tm.name ORDER BY sa.role, cnt DESC LIMIT 20;
